mapper.select: SELECT s.solution_id, s.algorithm, s.`type`, s.language, s.user_problem_id, s.created_at FROM solutions s JOIN user_problems up USING (user_problem_id) WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND s.user_problem_id = #{userProblemId} ORDER BY s.solution_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solutions (algorithm, `type`, language, code, user_problem_id, created_at) VALUES (#{algorithm}, #{type}, #{language}, #{code}, #{userProblemId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(s.created_at) AS activity_date, COUNT(*) AS solution_count FROM solutions s JOIN user_problems up USING (user_problem_id) WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND s.created_at >= #{startDate} AND s.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(s.created_at) ORDER BY activity_date

SELECT up.user_problem_id, up.user_id, up.problem_id, up.grade, up.solve_count, up.last_solved_date, p.title, p.number, p.difficulty, p.site, p.link, p.description, pc.category_name FROM user_problems up LEFT JOIN problems p USING (problem_id) LEFT JOIN problem_categories pc USING (problem_id) WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND up.user_problem_id = #{userProblemId}
